import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Menu, Search, Bell, Users, BookOpen, Briefcase, Settings, LogOut, Home, Key, UserPlus } from 'lucide-react'; /** * @typedef {Object} StatData * @property {string} label * @property {string|number} value * @property {React.ReactNode} icon * @property {string} colorClass - Expects "purple", "orange", "coral", or "green" based on CSS */ /** * @typedef {Object} DashboardProps * @property {string} userName * @property {StatData[]} stats * @property {Function} onRoleAssign * @property {Function} onLogout */ export default function Dashboard({ userName, stats, onRoleAssign, onLogout }) { const [isSidebarOpen, setIsSidebarOpen] = useState(false); // Controlled form state const [email, setEmail] = useState(''); const [role, setRole] = useState('student'); const toggleSidebar = () => { setIsSidebarOpen(!isSidebarOpen); }; const handleRoleSubmit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); if (onRoleAssign) { onRoleAssign({ email, role }); setEmail(''); setRole('student'); } }; // Safe fallback stats in case props aren't passed yet const displayStats = stats || [ { label: "Total Students", value: "1,204", icon: , colorClass: "purple" }, { label: "Faculty", value: "84", icon: , colorClass: "orange" }, { label: "Departments", value: "12", icon: , colorClass: "coral" }, { label: "Active Roles", value: "432", icon: , colorClass: "green" } ]; return ( <> {/* Sidebar */}

UniHRM

Dashboard Employees Departments Recruitment Settings
{/* Main Content */}
{/* Header */}

Dashboard

{userName ? userName.charAt(0).toUpperCase() : 'U'}
{/* Dashboard Content */}
{/* Stats Grid */}
{displayStats.map((stat, i) => (
{stat.icon}
{stat.value}
{stat.label}
))}
{/* Role Assignment Section */}

Assign Role to User

setEmail(e.target.value)} required />
{/* Recent Activities Section */}

System Login admin@skips.edu Just now Success
Role Assigned hr@skips.edu 2 hours ago Success
Password Reset user@skips.edu 1 day ago Pending
); }
